tagline: Civic space for the digital age
taglineBody: Public infrastructure, not a private platform. Real identity, not anonymity. Discourse, not disruption.
needInvite: You need an invite to join
usernameHint: Letters, numbers, and underscores only. Username is only used for logging in.

invitePhase.title: Beta phase — join by invite
invitePhase.description: Eulesia is in beta. Invited members can join without identity verification, but once strong authentication (bank credentials / EUDI Wallet) is enabled, account access will require verification.

ftnOpenPhase.title: Registration via strong bank authentication
ftnOpenPhase.description: New accounts are currently created through Idura FTN strong authentication. Finnish bank authentication is available now, and more authentication options and regions will be added later.

betaNotice.title: Beta terms
betaNotice.realName: Use your real first name and last name. Pseudonyms and fake accounts will be removed immediately.
betaNotice.strongAuth: Strong authentication will be enabled in the coming weeks. After that, account access will require verification via bank credentials or EUDI Wallet.

realNameNotice: Use your real name — pseudonyms and fake accounts will be removed.
termsAccept: I have read and accept the <termsLink>terms of service</termsLink> and <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>

ftn.nameFromBank: Your last name comes from the authentication service and cannot be edited. You can still change your first name.
ftn.requiredDescription: Registration currently requires identity verification with Finnish bank credentials through Idura FTN. After authentication, you can choose your username and password.
ftn.firstNameHint: You can still adjust your preferred first name.
ftn.alreadyRegistered: This identity already has an Eulesia account.
ftn.registrationLimit: Strong bank-auth registration is temporarily unavailable because the current monthly Idura registration limit has been reached. Please try again later.
ftn.availabilityNotice: Currently available: Finnish bank authentication via Idura FTN. More authentication options and regions will be added later.

noAttentionEconomy.title: No attention economy
noAttentionEconomy.description: No algorithmic feed, no infinite scroll, no engagement metrics. Your time is yours.

institutions.title: Institutions as participants
institutions.description: Public institutions participate as civic actors, not advertisers or "verified brands".

socialNotSurveillance.title: Social, not surveillance
socialNotSurveillance.description: Connection with communities and neighbors. No data harvesting, no ad targeting.

pleaseLogin: Please log in to view your profile

waitlist.noInvite: Don't have an invite? Join the waitlist
waitlist.title: Join the Waitlist
waitlist.description: Leave your email and we'll send you an invite code when your spot is ready.
waitlist.submitFailed: Failed to join waitlist. Please try again.
waitlist.successDescription: We'll send an invite code to your email when your spot is ready.
